flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oregon Institute of Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.5k → $37.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oregon Institute of Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.6k → $13.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Oregon Institute of Technology fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3k → 2.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oregon Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
